description_long: This is an elegant, high-backed chaise with a classic French-inspired design, featuring a tall, gently curved backrest and ornate cabriole legs. The seat and inner backrest are upholstered in smooth black leather or faux leather, contrasted by a light-colored wooden frame and exterior fabric. A decorative rectangular cushion with a bold black floral pattern on a cream background is placed against the backrest, adding a touch of sophistication. The armrests are padded and upholstered, matching the seat, and are supported by the same light wood as the frame. The rear and sides of the chaise are covered in a beige or taupe fabric, providing a soft visual contrast to the dark seat. This piece is both functional and decorative, suitable for upscale urban interiors or stylish public spaces.
description: A high-backed, French-style chaise with black leather upholstery, light wood frame, and a decorative floral cushion. The design features ornate cabriole legs and contrasting beige fabric on the exterior.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tall, curved backrest, black seat, padded armrests, and a decorative floral cushion.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the chaise's profile, showing the curved back, padded armrest, and the layered upholstery.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain beige fabric covering the back and the elegant wooden frame, with no visible cushion or seat details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same curved profile, armrest, and upholstery details.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall and gently curved, with a continuous, flowing outline and no visible segmentation or tufting. It is upholstered in black leather on the interior and beige fabric on the exterior, framed by a light wood border.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has armrests on both sides, padded and upholstered in black leather, with a light wood frame matching the rest of the structure.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are cabriole-style, gently curved and made of light-colored wood, with a smooth finish and subtle decorative shaping typical of classic French furniture.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The main upholstery is solid black leather on the seat and inner backrest, while the exterior is covered in plain beige fabric. The included cushion features a bold black floral pattern on a cream background.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, loose rectangular cushion placed against the backrest, featuring a floral pattern. The seat and backrest cushions are integrated and not separate from the main structure.
